defects.desc: Section background is solid white/light gray in clone; source has a deep black/dark background for this entire band — the most visually dominant property is wrong
Bottom ~60% of right side is solid black void — large swath of page content completely absent
Card grid layout is broken: LEFT shows a 2-column card grid with large dark rounded cards; RIGHT collapses into a single-column or misaligned list, destroying the grid structure
Overall contrast inverted — source text appears light-on-dark; clone renders dark-on-light — making the right side look like a completely different design
All four company logos are wrong: clone shows 'David AI', 'OpenRouter', 'şamaya', 'Cartesia' instead of original 'inngest', 'durable', 'upstash', 'Consensus'
Announcement banner and nav bar are stacked in reversed order: clone shows nav bar first (top), then announcement bar below it; source shows announcement bar first, then nav below
Hero heading, body text, and CTA are left-aligned in rebuild vs center-aligned in original
Rebuild renders a two-column layout (text-left / sign-up card-right) whereas original is a single centered-column block
Nav bar: 'Sign in' and 'Start building' CTA buttons missing from clone
Hero CTA buttons: 'Start building for free' (purple filled) and 'Build with agents →' (ghost/text) are unstyled plain text links in clone — no button styling, no purple background
Trust bar logos (G2 Crowd Stars, Braintrust, Happttel, Consensus on left) replaced with completely different logos (David AI, OpenRouter, Samaya, Cartesia) on right
Primary CTA button ('Start building for free') missing entirely — only the ghost/text 'Build with agents →' link is present on the right

Clerk sign-up modal rendered only as bottom fragment (Continue button + 'Already have an account?' + 'Secured by clerk'); missing 'Create your account' heading, social login buttons (Google/GitHub), email and password fields
Left sidebar 'USER AUTHENTICATION' section missing entirely — no section header, no component list (<SignUp />, <SignIn />, <UserButton />, <UserProfile />, <Waitlist />)
Documentation two-column layout collapsed — sidebar and content regions not correctly positioned; accordion items (B2B Authentication, Billing) float to top-left without surrounding structure
RIGHT side shows a large white/light diagonal shape intruding into the dark background — a bright wedge or angled block that is absent on the LEFT which is uniformly dark
UI mockup windows inside the feature cards are light/washed-out on the RIGHT vs deep-dark styled mockups on the LEFT — window chrome dots and dark backgrounds missing or wrong

Tab-panel layout hierarchy inverted: LEFT shows Auto-join org-chart as the hero panel at top with three smaller cards below; RIGHT renders all panels at roughly equal size in a different column arrangement, destroying the primary/secondary visual hierarchy
UI mockup inside 'Multifactor Authentication' card (device icons / auth interface illustration) is entirely absent on the right
UI mockup inside 'Fraud Abuse Prevention' card (inline form with CTA button) is entirely absent on the right
Feature card grid (bottom two rows of cards) is collapsed — cards render as near-empty dark bands with no visible internal content or imagery
Sidebar code-component tags (<SignUp />, <SignIn />, <UserButton />, <UserProfile />, <WaitList />) are absent from the CLONE left panel; only 'B2B Authentication' and 'Billing' collapse rows appear

Dark section ends too early in the clone — a large white void occupies the bottom ~40% of the right side where the dark background should continue; only a small angled white shape appears at the bottom of the original

Dark feature-card section: card internal UI mockups (embedded UI chrome, code snippets, credential/key field illustrations visible in source cards like Passwords and API Keys) are absent or reduced to plain text in the rebuild
Content vertical positioning is misaligned: source content sits at the bottom of the band, clone content starts near the top, indicating a layout height or padding mismatch
Logo rendering on right uses small thumbnail icons + plain text instead of the original styled brand wordmarks (e.g. inngest logotype, durable heart+wordmark, upstash S-mark+wordmark)
Nav bar background is dark/black in clone; source nav bar is white
'Pricing' and 'Sign in' nav items are merged as 'PricingSign in' with no space or separator
Announcement bar in clone lacks black background styling; appears on plain white/light background instead of the source's black pill/bar
Hero section below nav is entirely blank white in clone; source shows a light-gray background with subtle decorative dot-grid/UI-element pattern
'Create your account' sign-up form card is fully visible and dominant in rebuild but not present/prominent in this page band on the original
Nav bar: 'Docs', 'Changelog', and other right-side nav links missing or not rendered; only 'Products' visible in clone nav
Announcement banner ('Clerk raises $30m Series C · Learn more') missing from clone
'Choose an account' multi-account picker widget (visible bottom-left of source) is absent in clone
Background is black/dark where source shows white documentation page background

Content order differs: LEFT leads with Session Management, Social Sign On, Bot Detection, Magic Links; RIGHT reorders, surfacing Multifactor Authentication and Fraud and Account Prevention at top — sections are out of sequence
Bot Detection feature card: visible on LEFT with a dark UI mockup; not clearly present in equivalent position on RIGHT
Embedded UI mockup screenshot detail (form fields, list rows, syntax elements inside the dark app windows) is absent or heavily degraded on the RIGHT side
Card depth/shadow and dark surface styling of individual feature cards significantly lighter on RIGHT, losing the dark-glass aesthetic
Auto-join active-tab highlight and tab navigation chrome at top of the panel is absent on RIGHT — the active state indicator and tab row that sit above the org-chart are not rendered

Bottom feature-category navigation tabs (Privacy standards, Customization, B2B, Security, Bot detection) appear partially missing or unstyled on the RIGHT compared to the clearly rendered row on the LEFT
Org-chart people-photo cluster is smaller and repositioned on RIGHT relative to the large central placement on LEFT
'Advanced security' card and its right-column counterpart show only faint text with no visual weight; internal structure is lost
Large dark-gray empty area at bottom of clone where card content should continue
White horizontal bar visible at bottom of right side — artifact not present in original; appears to be a stray element or section divider leaking into frame
Framework/integration icon grid: RIGHT icons rendered as plain flat line-art without the circular container badge treatment present in the original (dark circular backgrounds with brand logos)
Angled black cutout shape at section bottom is visible in the clone but positioned incorrectly (floats in white space rather than terminating the dark band)
Card icon/graphic elements inside dark feature cards (small illustrations or interface screenshots in source) appear missing in rebuild, leaving cards as text-only blocks
Framework/integration icon grid items are noticeably larger in the clone — icons render at roughly 2× the original size, making the grid look blown up and unrefined

Sign-in UI mockup card (center-left feature card): rebuild renders the inner interface screenshot noticeably flatter and less detailed — missing the depth/contrast present in the original's dark modal overlay
Pricing card tier prices differ: original shows $9/mo and $19/mo, rebuild shows $5 and $10
Heading text in rebuild reads 'Subscription billing, without the headache' with noticeably smaller/lighter font weight than original's bold large heading
Testimonial card avatar profile photos appear as generic placeholders or very small low-contrast circles on the right vs clearly visible circular portrait photos on the left

Testimonial card profile avatar images in right column (ronaldsolicki, WebDevCode, Cim Stefan cards) appear missing or not rendered — circular image placeholders visible instead of actual profile photos
Footer body has noticeably less vertical padding/breathing room — columns and logo row are compressed top-to-bottom compared to the original's generous spacing
Right side (clone) renders as a nearly solid black band with no visible content; left side shows subtle dark UI elements/text that are not reproduced
Card/UI feature boxes below 'Explore B2B features' CTA are empty outlines with no content — source shows card content in that band
Organization UI Components card preview (far right): clone renders it as a plain white box; original shows a styled dark/frosted-glass inner panel with visible list rows and a 'Clark' badge
Dark/black background fills the lower portion of the clone below the nav bar; LEFT shows light/white background continuing to the bottom of the band
Dark rectangular card-like shapes visible at bottom-right that are absent on the left — next section or feature cards bleeding into this band
Footer background: right side shows a light gray/white background instead of the dark/black background visible on the left
Source shows faint text/label row near vertical center of band that is absent or shifted out of frame in the clone
Logo spacing/sizing is tighter and less balanced on the right; logos appear cramped relative to the evenly-spread originals
'Start building' CTA button in nav appears unstyled/plain text in clone vs styled button with chevron in source
'User Authentication' accordion row with expand caret visible in rebuild; not present in original within this band
Body text line-wrapping and column width narrower in rebuild due to column split, making paragraph text harder to scan
Clerk logo in nav: logo mark/wordmark appears present but nav links context is stripped
Hero sub-heading text reflows to different line breaks and appears lighter/smaller weight in clone
Overall hero section vertical spacing compressed in clone — less padding above and below heading

Body paragraph wraps differently on the right: 'then deploy to' breaks with an overflow indicator ('›' or '>') before 'your own domain.' — container appears narrower, causing reflow not present in source
Right-side text column is slightly narrower overall, compressing the paragraph layout relative to source
Fraud and Account Prevention section appears on RIGHT but is not visibly present as a distinct card on LEFT in this band — possible phantom section insertion
Small icon/glyph elements inside card headers appear as plain gray squares on RIGHT instead of styled icons on LEFT
Card spacing and white-space proportions are compressed on RIGHT — cards appear tighter and narrower, losing the airy grid rhythm of LEFT
'Check' button on Organization UI Components card on RIGHT appears as a plain unstyled element vs the styled button on LEFT
Section heading 'Explore B2B features' is cut off or less prominent on RIGHT top area
'Explore user authentication' CTA pill is smaller and less visually prominent than the source
Icon sizing in the grid appears smaller/less prominent on RIGHT compared to LEFT, reducing visual weight of the icon section
Spacing between icon rows appears tighter on RIGHT, compressing the grid compared to the looser, more spaced-out original
Section heading 'USER AUTHENTICATION' (uppercase, heavier weight) rendered as 'User Authentication' (mixed case, lighter weight) in CLONE
Sign-in modal form fields are pre-filled in CLONE (email address + dotted password) whereas SRC shows empty interactive placeholders
B2B Authentication and Billing accordion rows appear at a different vertical position and with different spacing relative to the content block above them
Card grid vertical spacing appears tighter in the clone, compressing the cards toward the top of the dark region
UI mockup panel elements inside API Keys card appear slightly smaller/less detailed in clone compared to original
Top of dark section on source shows a 'Contact Us' navigation link/button that is not visible in the rebuild at the same vertical position
Card grid in dark section has slightly different proportions — cards appear taller/more padded in rebuild, compressing the lower white section into this tile
Bottom white angled/diagonal decorative section appears clipped or offset differently in the clone vs the clean triangular cutout on the left
Overall section is taller in the clone due to oversized icon grid, causing vertical padding/spacing mismatch
Icon row spacing is looser in the clone — gap between icon rows is larger than source, compressing the visual density
Device/phone mockup in upper-right quadrant: right side renders it smaller and with less visual weight compared to the original's more prominent dark device frame
Social Sign On icon row (GitHub, Google, etc.): icons on the right are present but appear slightly smaller and less crisp, with reduced spacing between them
Card grid borders/separators: original has subtle but visible card delineation; rebuild's cards appear less defined with softer or missing border treatment
"Joseph Cole" avatar/label in Social Sign On card: present on both sides but right-side styling is slightly less refined (pill/button styling differs)
Magic Links section inner screenshot: rebuild's inline UI screenshot is present but appears lower contrast and less visually detailed than the original
Pricing card UI mockup on right lacks the same card border/shadow definition visible in the original — cards appear flatter

Card grid in testimonial section has slightly different inter-card spacing and vertical rhythm — right side cards feel more compressed
The 'Start building for free' CTA button on the right appears less visually distinct (color/contrast difference vs the more prominent teal/blue button on the left)
Social handle text under names in testimonial cards (e.g. @WalterDody) appears lighter/smaller on the right, losing contrast vs left
Right-column testimonial cards have slightly reduced visual separation/contrast between card backgrounds and page background compared to original
Minor font weight differences on testimonial author names across several cards in right column
Small spacing inconsistencies between testimonial cards in right column — tighter vertical gap than original
Copyright bar and social icons row sit closer to the column links than in the original; the separating whitespace is significantly reduced
Column inter-link vertical spacing is tighter in the clone — links appear denser than the original's more open list rhythm
Faint structural elements visible in source (small icons or text nodes at mid-left) are absent in clone
Small text visible at bottom-right of clone (appears to be a URL or label artifact) not present in source
'B2B Authentication' pill/tag appears slightly less prominent in clone (color/weight difference)
Large black void at bottom-right of clone panel obscures any remaining content in the band
Floating user-avatar cluster in the center feature area: avatar circles appear smaller/less defined in the clone, losing the subtle sizing variation of the original
'Join the project' button: clone button appears slightly lighter/less saturated green compared to the original's more vivid teal-green fill
Column header labels (Product, SDKs, Resources, Company, Legal) appear slightly lighter or thinner weight in the clone vs. the source
Arrow glyph '→' missing after 'Explore user authentication' CTA link on the right

Top-row feature icons (circular icon images above each card heading) are partially cut off/missing at the very top of the clone — the arc shapes visible in source are clipped more aggressively in the clone

'Billing' category pill above the hero heading: on the LEFT it renders as a clearly visible blue/indigo filled pill; on the RIGHT it appears lighter/less saturated and lower contrast, reducing its visual prominence

Floating avatar/icon button position differs — top-right corner in rebuild vs mid-right in original
Trust bar intro text ('Trusted by fast-growing companies around the world') present on both but positioned differently
